info.name: sefaizo-api
info.description: Unified Postman collection for Sefaizo API. All requests require the x-api-key header, and protected routes also require Bearer JWT.

request.description: Verify API is running.
Detailed health check with service metadata.

Détecte le flow à utiliser pour ce numéro + app.

**nextStep:**
- `OTP` — nouveau compte, passer par l'inscription
- `PIN_THEN_OTP` — compte existant sur cette app, passer par la connexion

**`app`:** `CLIENT` ou `PROFESSIONAL`

Envoie un OTP pour inscrire un nouveau compte.

**`purpose`:** `REGISTRATION` ou `PIN_RESET`
**`app`:** `CLIENT` ou `PROFESSIONAL`

Rate limit : 10 req/min.

response.name: 400 Slot Already Taken

request.description:
Vérifie le code OTP. Retourne un `challengeToken` à durée limitée (10 min) requis pour `register/complete`.

Le token a `scope: 'challenge-only'` — il ne peut pas être utilisé comme accessToken.

Crée le compte et le PIN. Requiert le `challengeToken` de `otp/verify`.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{challengeToken}}`

**Règles PIN :** exactement 4 chiffres, pas de motifs trop simples (0000, 1234, 1111…).

`firstName` et `lastName` sont **optionnels** ici — ils peuvent être fournis plus tard via `PATCH /sentinel/me`.

Retourne `accessToken` + `refreshToken` + profil avec `onboardingStep` :
- `PROFILE_PENDING` → nom non renseigné, rediriger vers l'écran « Compléter profil »
- `TERMS_PENDING` → nom OK, rediriger vers l'écran CGU

response.name: 400 PIN trop simple
409 Compte déjà existant (race condition)

request.description:
Valide le PIN pour l'app sélectionnée et envoie automatiquement un OTP de connexion.

Retourne un `challengeToken` (10 min) requis pour `login/complete`.

**`app`:** `CLIENT` ou `PROFESSIONAL` — chaque compte a son propre PIN.

Vérifie le code OTP de connexion. Requiert le `challengeToken` de `login/start`.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{challengeToken}}`

Retourne `accessToken` + `refreshToken` + profil avec le suivi d'onboarding :
- `hasAcceptedTerms` — `true` si les CGU ont été acceptées
- `acceptedTermsAt` — timestamp ISO d'acceptation des CGU, ou `null`
- `onboardingStep` — étape courante :
  - `PROFILE_PENDING` → nom manquant → écran Photo + Nom
  - `ESTABLISHMENT_PENDING` → profil pro manquant → écrans Type + Infos établissement
  - `LOCATION_PENDING` → localisation manquante → écran Localisation
  - `AVAILABILITY_PENDING` → horaires manquants → écran Contact & Horaires
  - `SERVICES_PENDING` → services manquants → écran Ajouter un service
  - `GALLERY_PENDING` → galerie manquante → écran Galerie photos
  - `TERMS_PENDING` → CGU non acceptées → écran CGU
  - `COMPLETED` → onboarding terminé → Tableau de bord

response.name: 401 Token de challenge requis

request.description: Envoie un OTP pour réinitialiser le PIN du compte `app` (CLIENT ou PROFESSIONAL).
Vérifie le code OTP de réinitialisation. Retourne un `challengeToken` requis pour `pin/reset`.

Réinitialise le PIN. Requiert le `challengeToken` de l'étape précédente.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{challengeToken}}`

Modifie le PIN en étant connecté. Requiert un `accessToken` valide (pas un challengeToken).

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

response.name: 400 Même PIN

request.description:
Enregistre l'acceptation des CGU par l'utilisateur connecté. Stocke un timestamp `acceptedTermsAt` en base.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

**Idempotent** — peut être appelé plusieurs fois sans effet de bord.

**Flow onboarding pro :**
1. `register/complete` → `hasAcceptedTerms: false`
2. → **`terms/accept`** ← vous êtes ici
3. `professional/profile` → crée le profil
4. `professional/:id/avatar/upload` → upload avatar

Rotate tokens: invalidate old refreshToken and issue new pair.

**Use when:**
- Access token expires
- Updating device info
- Rolling session forward
Retrieve authenticated user profile including metadata.

Met à jour le prénom et/ou le nom de l'utilisateur connecté.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

Retourne le profil mis à jour + `onboardingStep` recalculé.

Une fois le nom renseigné après `register/complete`, `onboardingStep` passe de `PROFILE_PENDING` à `TERMS_PENDING`.

Bouton « Finaliser mon inscription ». Marque l'onboarding comme terminé.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

**Prérequis :** toutes les étapes doivent être complètes (profil, CGU, établissement, horaires, services). Retourne `400` avec l'étape manquante sinon.

**Idempotent** — peut être rappelé sans effet de bord.

Logout current session or all sessions.

**Parameters:**
- `refreshToken`: (required) Token to invalidate
- `allDevices`: (optional) Set to `true` to logout all sessions, `false` to logout current device only

List all active sessions (non-expired, non-revoked refresh tokens) for the authenticated user.

Saves `sessionId` of first session for revoke test.
Revoke a specific session by its ID (from the list above). Use to disconnect a specific device.

Register or update the FCM/APNs push notification token for this device.

**Call after every login** to keep the token current.

**`platform`:** `IOS`, `ANDROID`, or `WEB`
**`deviceId`:** stable UUID generated on first install (stored locally on the device)
List public professionals with optional filters: status, isVerified, location, page, limit.
Search professionals by name, bio or services.
Recommended professionals ordered by relevance. Optionally filter by coordinates, commune and radius.

request.description: Get public profile for one professional.
Get services for a professional. Set includeInactive=true to include soft-disabled services.
Get availability for one day or the full week when dayOfWeek is empty.
Get public gallery/portfolio items for a professional.
Get the authenticated professional profile.
Get profile completion percentage.
Create the professional profile. Avatar is not accepted here — use *Upload Avatar* after creation.
Update the professional profile (text fields only). To update the avatar, use *Upload Avatar* instead.

formdata.description: Image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp — max 10 MB)

request.description:
Upload an avatar image to Appwrite and automatically update the professional profile.

**Response:**
- `avatarUrl` — public URL auto-saved to `profileAvatarUrl`
- `fileId` — Appwrite file ID saved to `mediaFileId`

No need to call *Update Profile* separately — the avatar URL is updated automatically.
List active global service categories with pagination. Public endpoint.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Admin only: create a new global category directly (no professional request required).
Admin only: update one global category by id.
Admin only: soft-delete a global category (fails if linked to active services).
Admin only alias for creating a global category.
Admin only alias for updating a global category.
Admin only alias for soft-deleting a global category.
Professional only: submit a category creation request for admin review.
Professional only: list own category requests.
Create a service offering for the current professional.
Update a service offering.
Deactivate one service.
Reactivate one service.
Soft delete one service.
Set or update travel fee for a commune.

formdata.description: Image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp — max 10 MB)

request.description:
Upload an image file for a specific service offering.

The uploaded URL is auto-saved to `serviceImageUrl` — use it in *Add Service* or *Update Service* as the `imageUrl` field.

Alternatively, after upload you can call `POST /professionals/:id/services/:serviceId/image` with `{ "imageUrl": "{{serviceImageUrl}}" }` to update an existing service.
Set a day availability slot.
Update the schedule of one day.
Open, close or put a day on leave.
Set the same availability across the week.

Set or update multiple availability slots in a single request (upsert). Each slot is identified by `dayOfWeek` (0=Sunday … 6=Saturday).

Existing slots for provided days are updated; new days are created.

**Body:** `availabilities` array — each item requires `dayOfWeek`, `startTime`, `endTime`; optional `breakStartTime` / `breakEndTime`.
Remove one day availability.

formdata.description: Image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp — max 10 MB)

request.description:
Upload an image file to Appwrite storage for the professional gallery.

**Response:**
- `imageUrl` — public URL auto-saved to `galleryImageUrl`
- `fileId` — Appwrite file ID saved to `mediaFileId`
- `path` — storage path `professionals/{id}/gallery/{uuid}.ext`

**Workflow:** call this first, then use `galleryImageUrl` in *Create Gallery Item* to persist the DB record.

formdata.description: First image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp — max 10 MB each)

request.description:
Upload multiple gallery images in a single multipart request.

Send up to 10 files using the field name `files` (repeat the field for each image).

All images are uploaded to Appwrite and persisted as `GalleryItem` records in a single call.

**Response:** `{ items: GalleryItem[], uploaded: number, failed: number }`
Upload a gallery item.
Update one gallery item.
Mark a gallery item as public.
Hide a gallery item from the public feed.
Reorder professional gallery items.
Soft delete a gallery item.

Get metadata for a specific file stored in Appwrite.

**Response:** `fileId`, `fileName`, `mimeType`, `sizeOriginal`, `viewUrl`, `downloadUrl`.

Access is restricted to the file owner (PROFESSIONAL) or ADMIN.

List all files uploaded to Appwrite for a professional.

**Query params:**
- `type` — `gallery` or `avatar` (required)
- `page` — page number (default 1)
- `limit` — items per page (default 20, max 100)

**Response:** paginated list of `MediaFileInfo` objects.

Permanently delete a file from Appwrite storage.

Only the file owner (PROFESSIONAL) or ADMIN can delete. Use `mediaFileId` populated after an upload.
List professional bookings with optional status filter.
Confirm a booking.
Reject a booking with an optional reason.
Mark a booking as completed.
Mark a confirmed booking as no-show when the client did not show up at the appointment.
List all pending cancellation requests for this professional's bookings.
Professional approves the client's cancellation request. Booking moves to CANCELLED.
Professional rejects the client's cancellation request. Booking stays CONFIRMED.
Admin only: verify a professional profile.
Admin only: suspend a professional profile.
Admin only: reactivate a suspended profile.
Admin only: list all category requests with optional status filter.
Admin only: approve request and optionally edit final category name/description.
Admin only: reject request, optional note.
Client creates a booking. Schedule overlap is allowed and returned as warning data.
List authenticated client bookings with optional status filter and pagination.
Get one booking owned by the authenticated client.
Update booking details while the booking status is PENDING.
Client asks the professional to cancel a CONFIRMED booking.
List in-app notifications for the authenticated user. Filter by status: ALL | READ | UNREAD.
Mark a single notification as read. notificationId auto-populated from List My Notifications.
Mark all in-app notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Register or update a push notification device for the authenticated user. platform: string (max 50), deviceId: string (max 200), pushToken: string.

variable.value: Merci de me contacter 10 min avant
